name: CrowdStrike + Netskope (Microsoft optional)
description: CrowdStrike Falcon Insight on the endpoint, Netskope as SWG/CASB at the network layer. A common non-Microsoft-first stack in financial services and enterprise.
compensating_controls: Use CrowdStrike Falcon Insight (DET-CS-FALCON-001) for endpoint detection equivalent to Defender for Endpoint.
Use CrowdStrike Falcon Data Protection (DET-CS-FALCON-002) for DLP equivalent to Purview Endpoint DLP.
Use Netskope's native Generative AI app tagging for SWG enforcement and discovery; export to your SIEM for correlation.
Identity-side: pair with Okta / Azure AD / Entra Conditional Access (whichever your identity provider is) for unmanaged-device blocking.

things_to_know.title: Falcon Data Protection has its own onboarding curve
things_to_know.content: Plan 2–4 weeks for sensor coverage and another 2–4 weeks of content-classifier training before enforcement.

things_to_know.title: Netskope native AI app tagging
things_to_know.content: Netskope's app catalog tracks Generative AI apps natively. Use the built-in policy templates for fast initial coverage.

things_to_know.title: Correlate to a central SIEM
things_to_know.content: Without Sentinel, route Falcon and Netskope events to a central SIEM (Splunk, Chronicle, Elastic, Panther) for cross-source correlation against the runbook triggers.

policy_token_replacements.siem_tool: your central SIEM (Splunk / Chronicle / Elastic / Panther)
policy_token_replacements.dlp_tool: CrowdStrike Falcon Data Protection (plus Netskope inline DLP)
